sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44533" key="eu)/news" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔνεως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ναῦς</etym>) <sense id="n44533.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well furnished with ships</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:31:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
